Dagger of Marnek  
 

Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 3 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +3 MANA: +15
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: NEC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Slot: RANGE PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 3 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: NEC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Dagger of Marnek the Wicked
Item Type:1H Piercing
Light:Tiny Glowing Skull
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:60
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live

Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 75pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Befallen
NPC Name
The Fabled Thaumaturgist
the thaumaturgist

This item is used in quests.

North Qeynos

Monk Purple Headband

Post Comment
damage bonus
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2022 at 6:45 AM Rating: Decent
catalinas
6 posts
I got this dagger recently; it doesn't have a damage bonus on it. Are there different versions of this item?
▲ Page top
Spawn locations
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2017 at 11:37 PM Rating: Decent
ObnoxiousLaughter
5 posts
The dagger only is dropped by few mobs and in a specific location. look around in the zone until you happen to find a well, drop down and follow the cavern until you hit a path on the right, when there, take the fork to the left and pow, the mobs you need (after this using the "Origin" AA in your window by pressing V, it'll get you out in a pinch)
▲ Page top
It still drops
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2005 at 2:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592765524065
16 posts
Dagger of Marnek dropped late 2004 off of Priest Amiaz. Strange as it seems, this priest was wearing plate armor and I suspected he was a Shadow Knight.

what droped this weapon according to monkly-business and eqatlas its droped off of a thaumaturgist. i was just at the camp for a few hours with no luck. If u are on druzil ro server and have one and want to sell it let me know i'll make ya a deal on it. Or if u have any info on it let me know thx

▲ Page top
Mana, not just int
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2001 at 5:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756619536
102 posts
At 40 I finally upgraded away from the dagger of Marnek that was given to me long ago when I was a young'n in s karana. I'm an Erudite, so I can get by with not too much int on my items. The bonus I need is mana.

And of course it's not just a range item; you can actually wield it, as I had been doing ever since I got my crystalline eye.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 07 2001 at 12:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well i got most of yall beat, i sold mine for 100pp this morning

#Anonymous, Posted: May 27 2001 at 5:02 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is for a monk quest....
This rocks
QuoteReply
# May 06 2001 at 12:22 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Got to admit this is a nice INT object. Fits nicely in the range slot for us Necro's. I picked mine up for 13pp. Next to doing the quest in Qeynos for the INT earrings, INT was never so cheap.

Necker DelRojo
20th Necro
The Nameless

-I agree with tmetcalf....-
Um, wrong answer... I'm sorry. You've been disqualified.
I've had one on my necro since level 6, and always carried in my range slot (Walrus tooth in primary, Harvester in secondary, and DoM in range).

QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 2:41 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591751804735
8 posts
Interesting to read that as it is currently sitting in my ranged slot at the moment. I even take it out and melee with it at times when my spells won't land, or I'm oom, and am able to put it right back. But since you said it can not be put in the range slot without telling us that you probably play a class that can't use it, I guess I'll have to not put it in my ranged slot anymore. Right.

Rovylern Shadeclaw

# May 15 2001 at 3:04 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You are mistaken. It can be used by 2 classes; by necros as a +3 int range slot item...


AND by monks to obtain their purple headband. I know a monk that would pay ya 100pp so he doesn't have to go down to Befallen at level 40 and kill greenies while newbies complain, in an effort to get the Thaumaturgist to spawn so he can get his purple headband so he can get his Robe of the Whistling Fists, so he can....
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2001 at 2:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965942997
16 posts
Sorry but this price is right as it is a realativly easy item to obtain and can only be used by 1 class this creates a limited market therefore bring the price down i know i bought mine for 30 pp
▲ Page top
RE: wrong prices(as always)
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2002 at 8:31 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
This is basically the same stats as a students homework, except for the 10 save vs magic on the homework. True it is necro only, but necro is a popular class. Camping thaumaturgist is a royal pain. rare spawn, with multiple possible spawn points, have to clear the whole room (3 spawns), not just one spawn. I would have never bothered to do this camp, except that I was caming Gynok for the paw of oppala. I saw the Thurmaturgist 2 times in about 7 hours. He dropped this twice, along with 2 different crappy robes. In contrast, I was in a group clearing the library in ToFS, and the angry librarian popped twice in less than one hour, and dropped the homework both times (too bad, I wanted the syllabus).

Befallen was empty when I did my camp, so I camped everything. All the SKs, the Thaumaturgist, Gynok, and was hoping for the priest, for a monk friend. Ended up with the chipped bone rod, 2 sets of barbed armplates and legplates, 2 daggers of marnek (yes I know they are lore, I camped my necro at the zone and transferred one), some crappy 2 ac ring, and two plat rings (again one on the necro, although this time, I had help from a friendly druid (who had showed up to PL a lvl 7 pally) who held the ring while I switched chars). Made the Gynok camp a lot more bearable (the second ring is for a friend, who's questing the paw with me, not to farm).
▲ Page top
